title: grindelia integrifolia var. macrophylla
intro: Grindelia integrifolia var. macrophylla, also known as Large-leaved Grindelia or Gum Weed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Grindelia integrifolia var. macrophylla include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and even help to lower blood pressure. Grindelia integrifolia var. macrophylla is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall respiratory health and well-being.
